message:
feat(extensions): add visibleWidth, wrapTextWithAnsi, Editor to ink shim

Expand the ink/pi-ui shim with additional exports that real-world
extensions depend on:

- visibleWidth(str): returns string length (simplified visible-width)
- wrapTextWithAnsi(text, _width): passthrough wrapper (ANSI-aware
  text wrapping stub)
- Editor class: minimal editor component stub with value property
- All added to the default export object

These stubs prevent ReferenceError when extensions import these symbols
from the pi-ui/ink compatibility layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
